origin.capability_match: Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals weekly

attack_surface.data_description: Internal BGT Foundation (Actor 7) review process and the mechanism for submitting its official recommendation to external governance systems.

trust_boundary_risk.boundary_name: Internal BGT Foundation Operations to External Governance

security_gap.gap_description: A single compromised or malicious BGT Foundation (Actor 7) member might be able to unduly influence the review outcome, or submit a false recommendation on behalf of the Foundation to external systems.

actor_risk.description: Compromise of a BGT Foundation (Actor 7) member's account or a malicious insider could lead to biased or false RFRV reviews submitted to external governance processes.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Abuse of review privilege by a BGT Foundation (Actor 7) member can lead to incorrect whitelisting decisions by external governance, posing financial and systemic risk.

assumptions: Internal controls within BGT Foundation (Actor 7) might not prevent a single malicious/compromised member from submitting a tainted review recommendation.
External governance processes might not have sufficient checks to catch a deliberately misleading review from the BGT Foundation (Actor 7).
Access credentials or systems used by BGT Foundation (Actor 7) members for the review process can be compromised.

mitigation.strategy: Implement multi-person approval (e.g., M-of-N signatures) for official BGT Foundation (Actor 7) review recommendations. Conduct regular security audits of BGT Foundation's internal processes and member access. Ensure strong authentication for review systems.

description: A compromised member of BGT Foundation (Actor 7), or a malicious insider, uses their privileged access to submit a fraudulent RFRV review recommendation. This misleads external governance systems into making incorrect whitelisting decisions for Reward Vaults.

trace_source.matched_capability: Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals weekly
